description: Sends messages and alerts to Telegram chats or channels via a bot.
plainEnglishExplanation: This node posts the generated summary into your selected Telegram chat.

setupGuide.title: Setting up your Telegram Bot (3 Easy Steps)
setupGuide.summary: To send Telegram notifications, you need a free Bot Token from Telegram.
steps: Open Telegram on your device and search for @BotFather.
Start a chat with BotFather, send /newbot, and choose a name for your bot.
Copy the HTTP API Token provided (e.g., 123456789:ABCdefGhI...) and paste it into Qonace!

requiredFields.label: Chat ID or Channel Name
requiredFields.description: The target Chat ID or channel username (e.g., @mychannel or 12345678)
